---
title: "Dr George Wilson"
---

## Dr George Wilson

**Dates:** (1818-1859)

### Description

chemist, museum director and science writer

### Biography

CMY had probably read John Cairns, \'The late Dr. George Wilson, of Edinburgh\' <i>Macmillan\'s Magazine</i> I (1860) 199-203.

### Letters

- Letter from March 25th 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
